race.comment: NINJITZOU (3) is busting to win and goes wet and dry. Stepped up to this trip at the Sunshine Coast last time, beaten 2L. Has a handy 2kg claim and has the gate speed to lead or box-seat. Comes back a level and gets his chance. SAN JOSE BOY (1) registered a strong win over 1700m at this track two runs ago and then ran on strongly again, beaten 1L this trip at the Sunshine Coast. Gets in well with the 2kg claim and may be able to position handier today. CANTARITO (5) gave away a big start this track/trip three weeks ago but had missed a nose in a Sunshine Coast 70 over 1800m prior. That stacks up, and she finally draws an inside barrier. Thompson is reunited. NOIRE EMPEROR (2) resumed in solid order at Doomben and drew wide and settled last in a 12-horse field at Eagle Farm, beaten 3.2L. He has more to give, and the step up to 1690m suits. Will be doing his best work late.
